name: ZLPhotoBrowser
desc: Wechat-like image picker. Support select photos, videos, gif and livePhoto. Support edit image and crop video. 微信样式的图片选择器，支持预览/相册内拍照及录视频、拖拽/滑动选择，编辑图片/视频，支持多语言国…
descFull: Wechat-like image picker. Support select photos, videos, gif and livePhoto. Support edit image and crop video. 微信样式的图片选择器，支持预览/相册内拍照及录视频、拖拽/滑动选择，编辑图片/视频，支持多语言国际化等功能;
